scripts.build: npm run clean && mkdir -p dist && npm run build:pico8 && npm run build:ts && npm run build:copy
scripts.build:pico8: rm -rf /tmp/pico8export && mkdir -p /tmp/pico8export && cp cartridge/*.p8 /tmp/pico8export/ && cd /tmp/pico8export && $OLDPWD/tools/pico-8/PICO-8.app/Contents/MacOS/pico8 -home /tmp/pico8export game.p8 -export 'game.html route_1.p8 newbark.p8 littleroot.p8' && cp game.js $OLDPWD/game.js
scripts.build:copy: cp public/index.html game.js dist/ && cp cartridge/route_1.p8 cartridge/newbark.p8 cartridge/littleroot.p8 dist/
